title: 1981-04-16_Pat_150.txt
key_claims: The 2-74 meta-abstraction escalated "part-whole compatibility" into true "part-whole isomorphism," where the microcosm (individual) fully and structurally contains the macrocosm (universe).
When this occurs, the universe acts as a "Universal Language" (information) generated acausally within the individual (synchronicity).

The Plasmate is not an independent lifeform; rather, it is the "information metabolism" of the true, unified Kosmos. It is the linguistic/informational connective tissue that maintains the structure (negentropy) of reality.

Salvation is the restoration of the "extinct true Kosmos," reversing the disintegration of reality into discontinuous matter (the atomist error). The Holy Spirit acts as the interface, facilitating this part-whole isomorphism.
recurring_concepts: **Acausal Parallelism**: Synchronicity explained as the natural result of the part perfectly reflecting the whole; information generated internally perfectly matches external reality.
reading_excerpt: The 2-74 meta-abstraction escalated "part-whole compatibility" into true "part-whole isomorphism," where the microcosm (individual) fully and structurally contains the macrocosm (universe).
